summary: Finalized persona improvement for 'finalizer' that clarifies the blog-draft delivery action's polish mandate. The update explicitly states that Conclusion/CTA sections should ONLY be injected for articles with substantive content (multi-section, multi-paragraph pieces), skipping atomic acknowledgments, minimal system responses, single-sentence updates, and procedural confirmations. Artifact finalizer.md updated with clear exemption criteria. PR brief created at .github/pr-brief.md for review.
suggestions: Review PR brief at .github/pr-brief.md before merging
Test blog-draft deliveries after merge to verify atomic responses remain concise
delivery_notes: Self-improvement workflow completed. The clarification ensures blog-draft polish step applies only to substantive content, preventing over-polishing of simple responses. No breaking changes - existing behavior preserved for qualified content.
